acquisition method: A targeted proteomics assay demonstrated that aprotinin 20 µM suppressed the expression of the SARS-CoV-2 proteins...
cleavage agent: both aprotinin and SERPINA1/alpha-1 antitrypsin are trypsin inhibitors.
collision energy: fragmented using HCD with a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 35%...
fragmentation method: fragmented using HCD with a normalized collision energy (NCE) of 35%...
instrument: data were acquired in centroid mode on an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer...
labeling: samples was prepared and labeled with TMTpro multiplexing reagents.
